appliedUpdates.description: Created initial user testing guide with validation concurrency limits and flow validator guidance for API/Process surface

notes: VAL-CROSS-006 validates that post-terminal ingress cannot mutate workflow state or PR linkage. All tests passed including reducer terminal absorption (149 tests), invariants property-based testing (1 passed), daemon-event route (84 tests), and GitHub webhook route (42 tests). The validation confirms that terminal states (done, stopped, terminated) correctly absorb all events with no transitions and no effects emitted.
